MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Dept. 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson, Clerk: David Swanson, Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Ronald W. Dahl appeared for Plaintiff and defendant appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held, settled on record. Defendant to pay $1,081 by 5th of each month and $7,432 by 3/15/02 by 6p.m. Trial date of Mar-18-2002 off calendar.
